name: post_task
description: Post-Task Checklist enforcement. Triggered after every significant task completion.

nodes.description: Update project_state.md with current stage, new outputs, data changes
nodes.instruction: Update {P}/workspace/project_state.md using Block Memory rules. Hot blocks: ## 當前階段(≤10行), ## 活躍任務(≤15行), ## 資料庫現況(≤10行), ## 活躍知識依賴(≤5行), ## 未解問題(≤5條), ## 主要產出（當前版本）(≤10行). Total: knowledge≤150行, project_management≤200行. Completed tasks → project_history.md (not project_state.md). Conditional: new data ingested→update 資料庫現況, new column meanings→append column_semantics.md, new report→record path in 主要產出.

nodes.description: Check decisions.md for new entries with D-NNN format, ensure sequential numbering
nodes.instruction: 1. Run: python shared/tools/kb.py next-id (get next D-NNN). 2. For each new decision: python shared/tools/kb.py add-decision --id D-NNN --date YYYY-MM-DD --project {P} --target '...' --question '...' --decision '...' --impact '...' [--supersedes D-XXX] [--refs_skill X] [--review_by YYYY-MM-DD]. 3. If no new decisions: complete with outputs {"path_contains":"decisions.md","skipped":true}. Validator checks sequential numbering + conflict detection; ERROR level blocks flow.

nodes.description: Record new rules/findings. Read checklist, report what was learned or explicitly state no new findings.
nodes.instruction: Read checklist: shared/workflows/checklists/post_task__record_knowledge.yaml. For each new learning: python shared/tools/kb.py add-learning --id <prefix>-LNN --title '...' --date YYYY-MM-DD --content '...' --confidence high|medium|low [--project {P}] [--related_decision D-NNN]. If no new findings, state explicitly in checklist_responses. Submit responses for ALL checklist items.

nodes.description: Evaluate memory snapshot conditions. Create snapshot if conditions met.
nodes.instruction: Conditions — ANY triggers snapshot: ≥3 files written | DB schema changed | report produced | ≥10 conversation rounds | ≥2 new decisions. If triggered: write shared/kb/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md with session summary (context, decisions, learnings, next steps). Complete with: --outputs '{"memory_conditions_met":true|false}'.

nodes.description: Verify workspace temp file count is within limits (zero-scatter rule). WARN at >5, FAIL at >15.
nodes.instruction: Scan for zero-scatter violations: (1) _tmp_*/tmp_*/test_output* files (WARN>5, FAIL>15); (2) files directly under projects/<name>/ not in workspace/ or vault/; (3) files under shared/ root; (4) *.backup.* or _backup/ dirs; (5) empty .gitkeep dirs >30 days old. Report count and paths. Clean up found violations.

nodes.description: Update backlog.db: mark completed items done, add new action items discovered during task. Required for project_management type projects.
nodes.instruction: Only for project_management type. Run: python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} list. For completed items: python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} resolve A-NNN --resolution '...'. For new discovered items: python shared/tools/backlog.py --project {P} add --title '...' --priority P0|P1|P2.

nodes.description: Check if /promote should be suggested (every 3 post_task completions)
nodes.instruction: Coordinator auto-counts. Every 3 completions it appends a [PROMOTE] reminder. No manual action needed unless reminder appears.

nodes.description: EVO-016: Regenerate .md exports from DB (DB is source of truth)
nodes.instruction: Run: python shared/tools/kb.py export all. This rewrites shared/kb/decisions.md and shared/kb/dynamic/learning_notes.md from kb_index.db. Non-blocking; skip if no new decisions/learnings were added in this task.
